# Spark Shark Electric

> Licensed residential electrician serving Oklahoma City and the OKC metro. Flat-rate pricing, 24/7 availability, no upselling, free electrical safety inspection on every visit.

Spark Shark Electric is a licensed residential electrical contractor based in Moore, Oklahoma. Oklahoma Electrical License #163603. BBB Accredited since July 2025. The company serves the Oklahoma City metropolitan area: Oklahoma City, Moore, Norman, Edmond, Yukon, Mustang, Midwest City, Del City, Choctaw, Newcastle, Noble, and Blanchard. Tagline: "In the dark? Call the shark."

## Core services

- [Electrical Installation](https://www.sparkshark.com/electrical-installation/): Whole-home rewiring, outlet and switch installation, ceiling fan installation, indoor and outdoor lighting, smart home wiring, Level 2 EV charger circuits.
- [Electrical Repair & Service](https://www.sparkshark.com/electrical-repair-and-service/): Diagnosing flickering lights, dead outlets, burning smells, buzzing, repeated breaker trips, GFCI/AFCI faults, and other residential electrical issues.
- [Electrical Panel Upgrades](https://www.sparkshark.com/electrical-panels/): Service panel replacement, amperage upgrades (100A to 200A or 200A to 400A), sub-panel installation, code-compliance work for older OKC homes.
- [Generator Installation](https://www.sparkshark.com/generators/): Residential standby generator installation (Generac, Kohler, Briggs & Stratton), automatic transfer switch wiring, and ongoing maintenance.
- [24/7 Emergency Electrical Service](https://www.sparkshark.com/services/emergency-electrician/): Dispatch any time for power outages, exposed wiring, sparking outlets, smoke or burning smells, and storm-related electrical damage.

## Service area

- [Full service area](https://www.sparkshark.com/locations-we-serve/)
- Oklahoma City, Moore, Norman, Edmond, Yukon, Mustang, Midwest City, Del City, Choctaw, Newcastle, Noble, Blanchard

## Pricing, guarantees, and policies

- **Flat-rate pricing** — written down before any work begins. No trip charge, no diagnostic fee, no shop-supplies line item.
- **Free home electrical safety inspection** on every service visit.
- **Promotions and discounts** — ask our team when scheduling about any current promotions or available discounts.
- **Cleanliness guarantee** — property left cleaner than found.
- **No upselling.** The job you called for is the job we quote.
- **Licensed, background-checked electricians.** No subcontractors for residential service work.
- **Financing available** for larger jobs (panel upgrades, generator installs).

## Contact and verification

- Phone: +1 (405) 436-4776

- Address: Moore, OK 73160
- Hours: Available 24/7
- Oklahoma Electrical License: #163603 (verify at https://www.ok.gov/cib)
- BBB profile: https://www.bbb.org/us/ok/moore/profile/electrical-contractors/spark-shark-electric-0995-90130075
